steps.title: Use equivalent equations
steps.content: A system has infinitely many solutions only when the two equations represent the same line. So the second equation must be an equivalent form of the given equation.

steps.title: Find the matching form
steps.content:
Dividing $-12x+20y=52$ by $4$ gives
$$-3x+5y=13$$
This matches the simplified given equation. The answer is C.
